domain_packs.name: AI Programming English
domain_packs.description: Technical English for IDEs, AI coding assistants, agentic coding, Git, CLI, debugging, and documentation.

cards.definition_zh: 扩展；用于增强软件功能的插件式模块。
cards.definition_en: A software add-on that extends an application's capabilities.

examples.example_en: Install the Cursor extension to add AI coding features to the editor.
examples.example_zh: 安装 Cursor 扩展，为编辑器添加 AI 编程功能。

examples.example_en: Disable the extension if it conflicts with your workspace settings.
examples.example_zh: 如果该扩展与工作区设置冲突，就禁用它。

usage_tasks: Understand Cursor website and IDE extension terminology.
cards.notes: Prepared outside the client and imported as reusable learning content. Compare with [[plugin]] and [[integration]]. #ai-programming #ide/editor
cards.frequency_reason: F1 because extension appears repeatedly in IDE setup, editor capability, install, and troubleshooting flows.
cards.source_context: Cursor official pages use extension for installable editor capabilities and integrations.
